summary: Iteration 16 - Auto-Contest, Dynamic Prize Pool, 50/30/20 Distribution Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Admin contest creation defaults to 1000 entry fee, 50/30/20 prize split info displayed, Dynamic prize pool text visible, Player view shows prize distribution. New user signup gives 100000 coins (1 lakh).

seed_data_creation: Test created new match with auto-contest, new user registration tested
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested auto-contest creation, dynamic prize pool, 50/30/20 distribution, 1 lakh signup bonus, default 1000 entry fee. All features working. Auto-contest creates 'TeamA vs TeamB - Mega Contest' when match is created. Prize pool = entry_fee × participants. Finalize distributes 50% 1st, 30% 2nd, 20% 3rd. Admin contest form shows Dynamic pool with 50/30/20 split info. Player match detail shows prize distribution text.

mocked_apis_list: Cricbuzz scraper returns connected:false in container environment
